name: Observation ID
description: Primary identifier for the observation record.

name: Observed property
description: ObservableProperty concept describing what was measured (water level, wind speed, PGA, temperature, PM2.5, head count).

name: Method
description: Observation method drawn from the Method collection (hydraulic, wind-field, seismic, thermal, crowd).

name: Made by sensor
description: Sensor resource that produced this observation.

name: Feature of interest
description: Site resource that the observation is about.

name: Result value
description: Scalar result value for the observation (unit implied by observed_property).

name: Result time
description: Time at which the result became available.

name: Phenomenon time-span
description: Time-span during which the observed phenomenon occurred.

name: Phenomenon start
description: Earliest time the observed phenomenon began.

name: Phenomenon end
description: Latest time the observed phenomenon ended.

name: Intensity band
description: Hazard-family-prefixed intensity band (from the IntensityBand collection).
